event.description: Intense solar particle event forces shelter-in-place

subsim_log.sexpr:
(let ((food 1.45)
              (water 0.93)
              (pop 8)
              (crisis 0.07))
          (if (> crisis 0.5)
            (list "ration" (* food 0.8) (* water 0.7))
            (if (> food 1.5)
              (list "expand" (+ pop 2) food)
              (list "maintain" pop food))))

colonist_diaries.entry:
Year 97 — Io (air)
Mood: contemplative. Event: Intense solar particle event forces shelter-in-place.
Action: gather_food. Colony morale: strained.

Year 97 — Vega-M (earth)
Mood: anxious. Event: Intense solar particle event forces shelter-in-place.
Action: explore. Colony morale: strained.

Year 97 — Ceres (air)
Mood: contemplative. Event: Intense solar particle event forces shelter-in-place.
Action: gather_water. Colony morale: strained.

meta_insight: Year 97: Titan proposes that recursive self-modeling reveals the colony itself may be a sub-simulation — governance should account for the possibility that their decisions are being observed

simulation_awareness.insight: Titan questions the nature of their reality
